import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let trimmed = string.trim(line)
let score = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

if score >= 90
  print("A")
else if score >= 75
  print("B")
else if score >= 60
  print("C")
else
  print("F")
end
